MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff KDF Post Street, is present.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, William Rivera, is present.
Attorney, Ming Chung , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Cary Kletter, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-08-2010 is vacated.
